= Template =
%title Montage Mindmaps Template

== mindmap ==

{{myimg:mindmap-01.jpg}}

== otl ==

{{{otl
# mindmap-01
	: fname=mindmap-01.jpg notitle
	: orientation=LR sgm=8 global_bw=0 global_ec="#8a8a8a" global_es=tapered leaf=def
	# root defaults
		:
		# root attribute line
			: verbatim
			:
			: : orientation=LR sgm=8 global_bw=0
			: : global_bc="#6a6a6a" global_bs=rounded
			: : global_ec="#8a8a8a" global_es=tapered leaf=def
			:
	# edge ends
		:
		# edgra
			: edgra 
		# edggo
			: edggo
		# edgyt8dm
			: edgyt8m
	# nodes
		:
		# colors
		# ---
		# edgt
			: edgt 
			# cgreen
				: cgreen
			# cred
				: cred
			# cblue
				: cblue
			# ccyan
				: ccyan
			# corang
				: corang
			# cyello
				: cyello
			# cpink
				: cpink
			# custom fill, text, and border
				: node bg="#f6fff6" fg="#245c2d" bc="#45A135" bw=2 bs=dashed
				# bg/bgcolor, fg/fgcolor, bc, bw, bs
					: verbatim
					:
					: : node bg="#f6fff6" fg="#245c2d" bc="#45A135" bw=2 bs=dashed
					:
		# types
		# ---
		# edgd
			: edgd
			# regular text nodes
				:
				# comment
					: commen 
				# underl
					: underl
				# verbatim
					: verbatim
					:
					: foo bar
					:
				# verbatim header and body lines
					: verbatim cyello hl1r Ehl1it Ehl1w2b l1r
					:
					: body word1, word2 in line1
					: body word1 word2 word3 in line2
					:
				# verbatim default header style
					: verbatim cyello
					:
					: body keeps old first header bold underline
					:
			# emphasized
				:
				# quest
					: quest
				# title
					: title
				# example
					: example
				# term
					: term
				# date
					: date
				# link
					: link
				# check this
						: check
			# important
				:
				# impor
					: impor
				# impog
					: impog
				# impob
					: impob
			# draw
				: draw
				:
				:  +-----------------+
				:  |   this is some  |
				:  |     simple      |
				:  |     drawing     |
				:  +-----------------+
				:           |
				:           |
				:           |
				:         -----
				:
			# image transforms
				: img_sk=mindmap-01.jpg|20
				# img_neg, img_gr, img_neg_gr_cn, img_sk
					: verbatim
					:
					: : img_neg=mindmap-01.jpg|20
					: : img_gr=mindmap-01.jpg|20
					: : img_neg_gr_cn_sk=mindmap-01.jpg|20
					:
		# multiline
		# ---
		# line1; line2
		# ---
		# edgl
			: edgl
			# syntax
				: verbatim
				:
				: multiline
				: --- 
				: line1; line2
				: ---
				: edgl
				:
	# subgraphs
		:
		# sgr'this is title'
			: sgr'this is a title'
			# commen
				: commen
			# commen
				: commen
		# sgpd'this is title'
			: sgpd'this is a title'
			# commen
				: commen
			# commen
				: commen
			# notice dashed border
				: w2r
		# start subgrapha s title
		# ---
		# sggtstart"title"
			: sggtstart"title"
			# notice dotted border
				: w2r underl
		# something in between 
			: commen
		# end subgrapha
		# ---
		# sggtend"title"
			: sggtend node
		# subgraph controls
			:
			# sgno disables child subgraphs below this node
				: node sgno
				# no child subgraph
					: commen
			# subgraph=off is the key/value form
				: node subgraph=off
				# no child subgraph
					: commen
			# sgmargin and sgm set subgraph margin
				: sgcs'subgraph margin' sgm=18
				# margin alias
					: commen sgmargin=18
	# node text
		:
		# implication
			:
			# arrow ->
				:
				# syntax
					: verbatim
					: 
					: arrow -> 
					:
			# arrow => 
				:
				# syntax
					: verbatim
					: 
					: arrow => 
					:
		# color 
			:
			# lines
				:
				# line1
				# line2
					: l1r l2p
					# syntax
						: verbatim
						:
						: line1
						: line2
						:  : l1r l2p
						:
					# verbatim header/body syntax
						: verbatim
						:
						: # header line 1; header line 2
						: : verbatim hl1r Ehl1it Ehl1w2b l1r
						: : body line 1
						: : body line 2
						:
			# individual words
				: w1g w2b
				# syntax
					: verbatim
					: 
					: individual words
					:  : w1g w2b
					:
			# individual words
			# spreaded across
			# multiple lines
				: l1w1g l1w2b l3w1c l3w2p
				# syntax
					: verbatim
					: 
					: individual words 
					: spreaded across
					: multiple lines
					:  : l1w1g l1w2b l3w1c l3w2p 
					: 
		# marker
		# lines
			:
			# line1
			# line2
			# line3
				: l1mr l2mg l3my
				# syntax
					: verbatim
					: 
					: line1
					: line2
					: line3
					:  : l1mr l2mg l3my
}}}					
          
== montage - syntax ==

{{{
auto {
	title="simple montage"
	mindmap-01.jpg
	mindmap-01.jpg
	[newrow]
	mindmap-01.jpg
}}}

== montage - image ==

{{{
montage montage.cm
}}}

{{{
             montage[.cm]
                ^ 
               /
 Mindmaps_montage.jpg
   |
   v
  upper
dirname
}}}

{{myimg:Montage_montage.jpg}}
